allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\GlowLoop -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.next' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(cd C:\\GlowLoop; $env:NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL="https://placeholder.supabase.co"; $env:NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY="placeholder"; npx next build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Vulns: {d[\\"metadata\\"][\\"vulnerabilities\\"]}'\); [print\(f' {k}: {v}'\) for k,v in d['vulnerabilities'].items\(\) if v.get\('severity'\) in \('high','critical'\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; [print\(json.loads\(line\).get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\)\) for line in sys.stdin]")
